name: Cider Sausage Stir-Fry (Marguerite Patten)
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Pork and beef chipolata sausages
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently twist the centre of each sausage to make cocktail-sized sausages, then cut to separate.
2. Slice the courgettes; dice the pepper, wash and slice the leek. Do not peel the apple; just cut it into small pieces.
3. Trim and slice the sweetcorn. Heat the oil in a wok or large frying pan, add the sausages and stir-fry for 5 minutes, or until browned.
4. Add the vegetables, apple, then stir-fry for a further 1 to 2 minutes. Season to taste.
5. Blend the cider and cornflour together, pour into the pan and stir until the sauce has thickened and the sausages are coated.
6. Serve with rice or pasta.
